display.purpose: Markdown H1 and the strongest note-level headings.

headline.purpose: Markdown H2 and major panel headings.

title.purpose: Section titles, note names, task group titles, and primary list text.

body.purpose: Settings copy, excerpts, task text, panel descriptions, and supporting UI prose.

label.purpose: Metadata labels and short uppercase group headers.

shadows.name: subtle-resting-lift
shadows.purpose: Small controls and active navigation items.

shadows.name: panel-lift
shadows.purpose: Cards and app panels that need separation from the page.

shadows.name: popover-lift
shadows.purpose: Search results, confirmations, and floating pickers.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Small color and opacity state changes.

motion.name: chrome-shift
motion.purpose: Editor card, related drawer, and split-pane layout transitions.

components.name: Primary Pill Button
components.description: Selected tabs and strong compact actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { border: 0; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--foreground); color: var(--background); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font: 600 0.875rem/1.2 var(--font-sans); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 92%, var(--background)); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Pill Button
components.description: Inactive segmented controls and secondary commands.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: var(--muted-foreground); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font: 500 0.875rem/1.2 var(--font-sans); transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-foreground); border-color: var(--border); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Field
components.html: <label class="ds-search"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"></circle><path d="m21 21-4.35-4.35"></path></svg><input placeholder="Search notes" /></label>
components.css: .ds-search { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 70%, transparent); border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--background); padding: 0 0.75rem; color: var(--foreground); max-width: 32rem; } .ds-search svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; color: var(--muted-foreground); fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; } .ds-search input { width: 100%; min-width: 0; border: 0; outline: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground); padding: 0.5rem 0; font: 400 0.875rem/1.4 var(--font-sans); } .ds-search input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-search:focus-within { border-color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 18%, var(--border)); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 8%, transparent); }

components.name: Navigation Pill
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 80%, transparent); border-radius: 9999px; background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--card) 70%, transparent); padding: 0.25rem; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .ds-nav a { display: inline-flex; min-width: 6.5rem; justify-content: center; align-items: center; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 9999px; color: var(--muted-foreground); padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; text-decoration: none; font: 500 0.875rem/1.2 var(--font-sans); transition: color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav a:hover { color: var(--foreground); border-color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 80%, transparent); } .ds-nav .ds-nav-active { background: var(--card); color: var(--foreground); border-color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 15%, transparent); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); }

components.name: Related Note Card
components.css: .ds-related-card { width: 100%; text-align: left; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--border) 70%, transparent); border-radius: 1.2rem; background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--background) 72%, transparent); color: var(--foreground); padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-family: var(--font-sans); transition: border-color 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-related-card:hover { border-color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--foreground) 18%, transparent); background: var(--background); } .ds-related-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--ring); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-related-card span { display: block; min-width: 0; } .ds-related-card strong { display: block; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-related-card em { display: block; margin-top: 0.25rem; color: var(--muted-foreground); font-style: normal; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-related-card b { float: right; border-radius: 9999px; background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--accent) 60%, transparent); color: color-mix(in oklab, var(--accent-foreground) 90%, transparent); padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-related-card p { clear: both; margin: 0.75rem 0 0; color: var(--muted-foreground); font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview:
Gneauxghts should feel like a calm Markdown notebook that understands context without announcing itself. The interface is quiet, fast, and interconnected: writing stays central, retrieval sits close at hand, and intelligent surfaces appear as practical utilities rather than branded AI features.

The system is personal software, not an enterprise workspace. It rejects Notion's do-everything sprawl, dashboard density for its own sake, and any visual language that makes the app feel design-led instead of notes-led.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome paper-and-ink palette with semantic red reserved for destructive action.
Rounded, tactile controls that support repeated keyboard and pointer use.
Dense but calm panels for search, tasks, settings, and related notes.
Tonal layering first; shadows only where a surface genuinely floats.
Intelligence appears as context, not marketing.

rules.name: The Monochrome Trust Rule
rules.body: The default app should work in paper, ink, and neutral layers. Do not introduce decorative accent colors unless a state or semantic role requires them.

rules.name: The Quiet AI Rule
rules.body: Semantic and AI-assisted features must use the normal palette. Never give them a special neon, gradient, badge, or campaign treatment.

rules.name: The Note-First Type Rule
rules.body: Editor content gets the strongest type hierarchy. Chrome, panels, and settings stay compact so they do not compete with writing.

rules.name: The Lift Only When Floating Rule
rules.body: A surface at rest should usually be separated by tone and border. Use shadow only when the element is physically above the workspace or actively selected.

dos: Do keep the note at the center; editor content gets priority over surrounding chrome.
Do use paper, ink, neutral surfaces, thin borders, and restrained shadows as the default visual language.
Do preserve keyboard-first workflows with visible focus and stable layouts.
Do use red only for destructive or error states.
Do make semantic search and related-note features feel like context appearing at the right moment.
donts: Don't make Gneauxghts feel like Notion's broad do-everything workspace.
Don't make it feel like enterprise software, a dashboard suite, or an AI-forward product that constantly markets its intelligence.
Don't add decorative gradients, glassy effects, neon AI accents, or feature badges for intelligence.
Don't use heavy color on inactive states or decorate list items with colored side stripes.
Don't let rounded panels nest into more rounded panels until the interface becomes a stack of cards.
